sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107735" key="u(/peron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὕπερον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕπερος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕπερα, τά.</foreign> </entryFree>
